envelope.instructions: Produce exactly one review decision from the supplied deploy_signal, current_version, prior_version, and forward_fix_evidence. Do not deploy, roll back, publish, call providers, mint authority, or create a universal proposal envelope. If deploy_signal is critical/failing and prior_version is supplied, return decision.action rollback, reason error_rate_critical when the signal kind/evidence shows an error-rate critical incident, and set decision.version_target from prior_version only. Seed release_publish_approval with gate_id release.publish.approval, approved true, and the same reason; name release as the downstream skill that owns the actual consequence. If the signal is contradictory, thin, nonfailing, lacks evidence, lacks prior_version for rollback, or lacks tested forward-fix evidence for roll-forward, return a hold decision with escalation.required true, name the missing evidence, set release_publish_approval.approved false, and do not invent targets, tests, signoff, or authority. review_record.form must be review and must cite the supplied signal severity/kind plus the evidence fields used.
envelope.trust_boundary: native-managed: runx executes the model and tool loop directly, receipts the result, and only yields to a surface for explicit human resolution outside this path
